title: Deep consolidate-docs workflow opened
body: Owner requested a deep consolidate-docs workflow. Identity preflight resolved Sylvan Sprouting Grove / codex / GPT-5 / 019e12. I consulted active claims at 2026-05-10T14:50:26Z: Windswept Sweeping Gale owns the Claude insight-report disposition plan, owner-course-correct pattern, and pending-graduations; Stormbound Floating Current owns invoke-rule/expert cleanup surfaces. I am proceeding as a broad, mostly read-oriented consolidation scan, avoiding their claimed implementation surfaces for substantive edits and surfacing owner-approval points before Practice Core, directive, or overlapping graduation mutations.
